texto: Once the subject matter of rock n' roll changed from cars and pop love songs to songs about really true love and the blues and death and mortality, this light bulb went off in my head and I went, 'Oh, that's what they're doing. That's kind of - that's art.'
explicacao: Citação de David Chase sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “Once the subject matter of rock n' roll changed from cars and pop love songs to songs about reall…” articula amor, love, art em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como luto e mudanca.

texto: 'The Sopranos' is filled with really retrograde humor. Bathroom humor, falls, stupid puns, bad jokes - infantile, adolescent stuff, but it makes me laugh.
explicacao: Citação de David Chase sobre temas ligados a humor. “'The Sopranos' is filled with really retrograde humor. Bathroom humor, falls, stupid puns, bad jo…” articula humor, stupid, me em registro de humor, com relevância para contextos como me e laugh.

texto: I said it's a cold universe and I don't mean that metaphorically. If you go out into space, it's cold. It's really cold and we don't know what's up there. We happen to be in this little pocket where there's a sun. What have we got except love and each other to guard against all that isolation and loneliness?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de David Chase que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “I said it's a cold universe and I don't mean that metaphorically. If you go out into space, it's …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre amor, love, loneliness, com foco em loneliness e sun.
